description: Cron-driven parallel backfill of N partitions of an existing partitioned asset. Complements Dagster's first-class backfill machinery for predictable recurring rebuilds.

target_asset_key.label: Target Asset Key
target_asset_key.description: Partitioned asset to materialize per partition (must already be defined elsewhere)

partition_count.label: Partition Count
partition_count.description: Number of partitions to backfill (when strategy=last_n_days)

dynamic_partitions_def_name.label: Dynamic Partitions Def Name
dynamic_partitions_def_name.description: Name of the DynamicPartitionsDefinition to read keys from (when strategy=dynamic_all or dynamic_subset). Must match the name argument the target asset's partitions_def was constructed with.

dynamic_filter.label: Dynamic Filter
dynamic_filter.description: Python regex applied to each dynamic-partition key (when strategy=dynamic_subset). Keys matching are kept.

concurrency_key_template.label: Concurrency Key Template
concurrency_key_template.description: Template for per-partition concurrency keys. Placeholder: {partition_key}. e.g. 'tenant-{partition_key}' makes same-tenant runs serialize while cross-tenant parallelize.

max_concurrent_tag_value.label: Max Concurrent Tag Value (legacy)
max_concurrent_tag_value.description: A single static concurrency-key applied to every per-partition op. Use concurrency_key_template instead for the per-partition shape.
